query:
SELECT 
  pc.position_id,
  c.name as category_name,
  COUNT(q.id) as question_count
FROM position_categories pc
LEFT JOIN categories c ON pc.category_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN questions q ON q.category_id = c.id AND q.position_id = pc.position_id
WHERE pc.position_id IN (7, 90002)
GROUP BY pc.position_id, c.id, c.name
ORDER BY pc.position_id, c.name;
